title: 100 Foot Wave
description: 100 Foot Wave is an HBO documentary series following big-wave surfer Garrett McNamara and a global community of surfers as they chase record-breaking waves in Nazaré, Portugal. It blends high-stakes surf footage with deeply personal storytelling, capturing the obsession, the risk, and the emotional weight of pushing the limits of the ocean.

title: Songs from the Hole
description: Songs from the Hole is a genre-defying Netflix documentary that blends nonfiction storytelling with a visual album, following incarcerated musician James “JJ’88” Jacobs as he works through trauma, guilt, and healing in music made while in prison. Real-life narrative, lyrical journal entries, and imagined memories weave together into an intimate, emotionally layered portrait of redemption and self-discovery.

title: Mr. McMahon
description: Mr. McMahon is a Netflix documentary series exploring the life and legacy of Vince McMahon, the controversial architect behind WWE’s global empire. It traces his rise from regional promoter to cultural force, unpacking the blurred lines between performance and reality, power and persona, and the lasting mark he left on sports entertainment.

title: Full Swing
description: Full Swing is a Netflix documentary series following professional golfers through a high-stakes season on the PGA Tour, with an intimate look at the pressure, discipline, and personal lives behind a traditionally reserved sport. By pairing tournament coverage with behind-the-scenes access, it reveals the emotional and psychological realities of competing at the highest level.

title: Bill Russell: Legend
description: Bill Russell: Legend is a Netflix documentary that honors the life and legacy of NBA icon Bill Russell, both as a record-breaking athlete and as a pivotal figure in the civil rights movement. It moves between his dominance on the court and his impact off it, painting a portrait of a man who reshaped not just a sport but a culture.

title: Teenage Euthanasia
description: Teenage Euthanasia is an Adult Swim animated series that mixes dark comedy with surreal, offbeat storytelling, following a dysfunctional family running a funeral home in Florida. It leans into chaotic humor and emotional absurdity, with a distinctly stylized tone that balances irreverence with unexpected moments of heart.

title: Unbanked
description: Unbanked is a documentary exploring the lives of Americans living outside the traditional financial system, shining a light on the systemic barriers that make basic banking inaccessible for millions. Through personal stories and on-the-ground perspectives, it examines how financial exclusion shapes everyday life and reveals the human impact behind an often invisible issue.

title: Casey Anthony: Where the Truth Lies
description: Casey Anthony: Where the Truth Lies is a Peacock documentary series that revisits one of the most polarizing criminal cases in recent memory. For the first time on camera, Casey Anthony shares her version of the events surrounding her daughter’s death, offering a deeply subjective perspective on a case that still divides public opinion.
lead: Casey Anthony: Where the Truth Lies

title: Whatever it Takes: Inside the ebay Scandal
description: Whatever It Takes: Inside the eBay Scandal is a true-crime documentary that uncovers a shocking corporate harassment campaign, following a couple targeted by a coordinated cyberstalking operation tied to eBay employees. What starts as online intimidation escalates into real-world threats, exposing a disturbing abuse of power and how far a corporation was willing to go to silence its critics.
lead: Whatever It Takes: Inside the eBay Scandal

title: County Rescue
description: County Rescue is a faith-driven drama series following a team of EMTs and paramedics as they navigate the high-pressure world of emergency response alongside their own struggles and relationships. Centered on a group of trainees competing for a single position, it blends life-or-death stakes with themes of purpose, resilience, and belief.

title: Suspicious Minds
description: Suspicious Minds is an experimental short film about a fractured encounter at a surreal Halloween rave, where a public breakup spirals into an unexpected connection. Weaving together romance, memory, and dreamlike imagery, it drifts between emotional reality and abstraction, exploring how the past shapes the way we see the present.

title: The Way It Was: Paris restaurants in the 1970's
description: The Way It Was: Paris Restaurants in the 1970s is a documentary that captures a vivid snapshot of Paris’s culinary world during a transformative era. Through observational footage and archival perspective, it explores the culture, the people, and the evolving ecosystem of restaurants in 1970s Paris, opening a rare window onto a moment of artistic and gastronomic history.
lead: The Way It Was: Paris Restaurants in the 1970s

title: Year One: A Political Odyssey
description: Year One: A Political Odyssey is a documentary following President Joe Biden’s first year in office, with an inside look at the administration’s early challenges and decisions. Through interviews and behind-the-scenes access to key figures, it captures a pivotal moment in contemporary U.S. politics as it unfolds in real time.

title: Loopers
description: Loopers is a comedy series about golf, money, and the hustle of the American caddy. When a teenage newcomer on a summer job starts getting booked more than the seasoned veterans, despite having no experience, the whole caddy ecosystem descends into chaos. As the older caddies scramble to win back clients and protect their tips, the show digs into competition, ego, and the absurd economics behind the game.

title: Portrait of a Young Criminal
description: Set in deeply unequal Nepal, Portrait of a Young Criminal follows a young man as he navigates the blurred lines between crime, justice, freedom, and redemption, dreaming of killing a selfish man for what he believes is the greater good.

title: Impostor Syndrome
description: A commercial food stylist arrives on set only to find she has to confront a sinister, strangely familiar stylist who has taken her place.

title: Girls, But Boys
description: Girls, but Boys is about what happens when a failing relationship collides with a tight circle of friends, and the poor communication, modern dating pressure, and fear of missing out that brought them together is exactly what pulls them apart. Jack and Lena sit at opposite ends of a high-stakes casual relationship that hinges on what matters to, well, who? They aren’t quite sure. Jack tries to navigate his morals without letting anyone down, chasing a modern utopia where he faces no ethical or logistical dilemmas, while Lena waits for him to commit to a relationship he says he wants even as his actions suggest otherwise. Apart and together, the would-be couple and their friends are all waiting for nothing to happen.

title: Art Heist
description: Two coworkers prank their office by swapping out the artwork, but their harmless joke soon spirals into something much bigger.

title: 5 Minutes by Car
description: 5 Minutes by Car follows Allan, a student working a quiet night shift as a line cook, when a simple act of kindness sends him down an unexpected road.

title: Rockabye Birdy
description: After receiving a letter from the boy she gave up for adoption years ago, a sheltered young woman leaves her rural town on a journey to reconnect with her child.

title: Salvation is Within You!
description: Set in the run-up to the infamous Sacco and Vanzetti trial of the 1920s, Salvation is Within You! is a historical thriller that follows two brothers down the path of political radicalism, just as the government tightens its grip on their Italian immigrant community.

title: Swallowtails
description: Swallowtails unfolds over a single late night outside a 1983 prom, following two cousins drifting at the edges of the same moment. Each is reeling from her own version of rejection and holding very different views on life, but as the night stretches on, that distance gives way to understanding. When one is confronted with her boyfriend’s betrayal, she finds the courage to stand up for herself, transforming both her sense of self and their relationship.

title: Like Clockwork
description: A contemporary retelling of Alice in Wonderland set against the bustle of New York City, Like Clockwork follows grad student Ali as she grapples with a life-changing job offer and the unexpected return of an old fling.

title: Sornyak
description: A struggling father’s crumbling sense of identity slowly poisons the home he’s fighting to hold together.

title: Fractured Paradise
description: A young New York City couple falls into an emotional argument when one of them wants to move away.

title: Red Delicious
description: A woman is pushed to desperate measures as she races to replace her failing organ transplant before it’s too late.

title: May Be Unholy
description: When her new roommate moves in, a pragmatic, no-nonsense atheist finds herself briefly convinced that witches are real.
